{{Quote|I have a bad feeling about this.|Solo after arriving at Okikuti|<ref name="SW:GB" />}}
'''Okikuti''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] located on the banks of a large lake. The town was located in a forest clearing and contained farms, housing structures, an [[animal nursery]], and mining facilities.

==Description==
Okikuti was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. The city was bordered on the east by a [[lake]] and surrounded by a forest. Okikuti featured a [[Command center]], [[prefab shelter]]s, a [[Carbon processing center]], [[Farm/Legends|farms]], and military buildings such as a [[Barracks/Legends|troop center]]. The city also featured a [[War Center]] and a [[Animal nursery|nursery for animals]], and was protected on one side by walls and two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser turrets]].<ref name="SW:GB" />

==History==
In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], shortly after the [[Declaration of a New Order]], Okikuti was attacked during a [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|battle]] on Kashyyyk.<ref name="DV">''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]''</ref>

[[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later, after [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|rebuilding]] the [[Government Tree]] in [[Kepitenochan/Legends|Kepitenochan]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] realized that [[Jammer/Legends|jammers]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] prevented them from communicating with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. According to the Wookiee [[Weebacca]]'s [[Scout/Legends|scouts]], they were found in Okikuti, so Solo and Chewbacca left Kepitenochan and went there to destroy them. When the Wookiee strike force arrived, however, they discovered an empty city instead of jammers, and they were ambushed by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Hindane Darcc/Legends|Darcc]]'s forces emanating from a nearby [[Unidentified Imperial base (Okikuti)|Imperial base]], and with the city hemmed in by the forest, their sole exit was blocked. Solo's prior mistrust of Weebacca was justified, as he had betrayed them.<ref name="SW:GB" />

Unable to withstand Darcc's attack, Solo hit upon the idea of clearing a path through the forest to escape by [[Water/Legends|water]]. They ordered the Wookiee workers they had brought along to cut through, and they soon reached the lake and quickly built a [[Shipyard (water)|shipyard]] and a serviceable [[Transport Ship (Wookiee)|transport]]. Solo and Chewbacca managed to escape with their army and reach the jammers at [[Chenachochan]] before more Imperial reinforcements arrived.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Okikuti was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] for the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. It appeared during a Chewbacca campaign mission. The mission and thus the city was also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']]. Once arriving at Okikuti, the player must prevent the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Solo and Chewbacca while using workers to clear a path to the lake and build a shipyard. If the player waits too long, [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]] attack.
